mapper.sql: SELECT id, name, city, province, level, create_time FROM schools
mapper.select: WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, FIELD(level, '985', '211', '双一流', '普通本科', '专科'), name
WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, FIELD(level, '985', '211', '双一流', '普通本科', '专科'), name LIMIT #{limit}
